creator: poyopoyo@puripuri.plala.or.jp
text:
At Mon, 14 May 2012 10:00:10 GMT,
makc@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Already updated to 1.2.0 (PR ports/166137). Please, request to close old
> PR in a future, when submitting a new one. Thanks!

At the moment of my submission the web interface/query-pr.cgi did not
find ports/166137 for me, perhaps because its state was not "open". So
please note I could not request such a thing. Thank you.

-- 
kuro
